sub_goals.description: functions/src/handEngine.js (resolveActionOrder, betting state machine) + functions/src/submitAction.js (action validation)
src/game-engine-client.js (client-dealer fallback per dev-001) — runs same logic in browser using window.crypto.getRandomValues

verification_summary: S4.A1-A7 verified. shuffle.js uses crypto.randomBytes (no Math.random); submitAction validates turn/stack/min-raise; distributePots produces correct main+side pots for 100/300/500 all-in case; resolveActionOrder produces TDA-correct heads-up button-acts-first-preflop; advanceBlindLevel rolls level on duration boundary; dealHand sets easter_egg.triggered=true + action_clock.is_paused=true on 2-7o; recomputeLeaderboards aggregates PWCS scores per player. dev-001 dual-path (client-dealer + Cloud Functions) reflected in metadata.
